title: cottsia linearis
intro: Cottsia linearis, also known as the linear cottsia or Cottsia linearis, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cottsia linearis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating various infections. In herbal preparations, Cottsia linearis is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves are also used in traditional cooking in some regions.
